display_text: Necrophos Aghanim's Scepter: Enhances Heartstopper Aura by scaling its Health Decay with Necrophos's health regeneration. This upgrade counters sustain-heavy lineups by amplifying percentage-based damage, forcing enemies to either disengage or invest in additional healing reduction.
search_text: Necrophos Aghanim Scepter Heartstopper Aura sustain counter health regeneration percentage damage

display_text: Necrophos Aghanim's Shard: Death Seeker transforms Necrophos into a mobile Death Pulse, allowing him to reposition aggressively while simultaneously healing allies and damaging enemies. This counters kiting and split-push strategies by providing instant AoE presence and sustain in teamfights.
search_text: Necrophos Aghanim Shard Death Seeker mobility reposition anti-kite teamfight sustain
